iterations.theme: Alex Hay's Journey from Documentary Editor to Indie iOS Developer with Toolbox Pro
iterations.reason_for_cut: This iteration covers the entire podcast episode, from the initial introduction of the guest and his background to the detailed discussion of his app, its development, launch, and future aspirations, concluding with his inspirations. The narrative flows continuously without a major thematic shift that would warrant a split.
